title: EFL scrap three-window transfer ban for late payments
summary: The English Football League has voted to reduce the length of transfer windows restricted for clubs making late payments. This policy adjustment modifies disciplinary measures for financial rule violations.
content: Clubs in the English Football League vote to reduce the length of free-restriction transfer windows for late payments.

zh.title: EFL取消延迟支付俱乐部的三个转会窗口禁令
zh.summary: 英超联盟投票决定缩短对逾期付款俱乐部的转会窗口限制期限。此项政策调整修改了对财务规则违规的纪律措施。

title: Guardiola quit '100 times' in the past - Khaldoon
summary: Manchester City chairman Khaldoon Al Mubarak revealed that manager Pep Guardiola has threatened to resign approximately 100 times in the past, though he has been persuaded to remain. The disclosure provides context for understanding Guardiola's ongoing commitment to the club.
content: Chairman Khaldoon Al Mubarak knew Pep Guardiola was serious about quitting as Manchester City manager after talking him round on previous occasions.

zh.title: 瓜迪奥拉过去威胁辞职"100次"——哈尔当
zh.summary: 曼城主席哈尔当透露，经理佩普·瓜迪奥拉过去曾威胁辞职约100次，但他被劝说继续留任。这一披露为理解瓜迪奥拉对俱乐部的持续承诺提供了背景。

title: Argentina fans arrive after cycling to Kansas
summary: Three Argentine fans completed a 10,500-mile cycling journey from their hometown of Gualeguaychu to Kansas to attend their nation's World Cup opening match. Their extraordinary effort demonstrates the dedication of supporters traveling to support their team at the tournament.
content: Three friends from Argentina arrive in Missouri in Kansas after cycling 10,500 miles from their home in Gualeguaychu to the venue of their team's opening game of the World Cup.

zh.title: 阿根廷球迷骑自行车抵达堪萨斯州
zh.summary: 三名阿根廷球迷完成了从家乡瓜莱格亚丘到堪萨斯州10,500英里的自行车之旅，以参加本国的世界杯揭幕战。他们非凡的努力展示了球迷们为支持球队参加锦标赛所表现出的奉献精神。

title: Unsold Scotland World Cup tickets put on resale sites
summary: Unsold tickets for Scotland's World Cup match against Haiti on June 12 are appearing on third-party resale websites. The development highlights questions about ticket distribution and accessibility for the upcoming fixture.
content: Dozens of tickets for the Scotland vs Haiti match on 12 June are listed on the third-party sites.

zh.title: 未售出的苏格兰世界杯门票被放在转售网站上
zh.summary: 苏格兰对阵海地的世界杯比赛（6月12日）的未售出门票出现在第三方转售网站上。这一发展突显了关于门票分配和即将举行的比赛可及性的问题。

title: Wembley defeat, another manager sacked - what's going on at Salford City?
summary: Salford City, despite having prominent ownership, remains in League Two and has dismissed another manager following a Wembley defeat. The repeated managerial changes suggest systemic organizational challenges affecting the club's performance.
content: Famous owners but stuck in League Two with another manager sacked - what's happening at Salford City?

zh.title: 温布利失利，又一位主教练被解雇——萨尔福德城发生了什么？
zh.summary: 尽管拥有知名所有权，萨尔福德城仍然留在英乙联赛中，在温布利失利后解雇了另一位主教练。多次的主教练变更表明了影响俱乐部表现的系统性组织问题。

title: Former Scotland forward Brazil 'lucky' to be alive
summary: Former Scotland striker Alan Brazil expressed gratitude for surviving a recent liver transplant, stating he is "very, very lucky to be here." His recovery underscores the life-saving impact of organ donation.
content: Former Scotland striker Alan Brazil says he is "very, very lucky to be here" after recent liver transplant.

zh.title: 前苏格兰前锋巴西"很幸运"活了下来
zh.summary: 前苏格兰前锋艾伦·巴西对成功度过最近的肝脏移植表示感激，称他"非常非常幸运在这里"。他的康复彰显了器官捐献拯救生命的影响。

title: Heat experts warn 'reckless' Fifa of bottle ban health risk
summary: Fifa has banned reusable water bottles from World Cup stadiums due to safety concerns, a decision that heat experts are criticizing as potentially dangerous during hot weather. The last-minute policy change raises concerns about fan welfare at the tournament.
content: Fans will not be allowed to take reusable water bottles into World Cup stadiums due to safety concerns, Fifa says in a late policy change.

zh.title: 高温专家警告国际足联水瓶禁令"鲁莽"且有健康风险
zh.summary: 由于安全考虑，国际足联禁止在世界杯体育场使用可重复使用的水瓶，高温专家批评这一决定在炎热天气下可能很危险。这一仓促的政策变化引发了人们对锦标赛期间球迷福祉的担忧。

title: Falkirk's Miller agrees three-year deal with Hearts
summary: Midfielder Calvin Miller has agreed to a three-year contract with Hearts, joining from Falkirk later this month. The transfer strengthens Hearts' squad composition ahead of the upcoming season.
content: Calvin Miller agrees a three-year contract to join Hearts from Falkirk later this month.

zh.title: 法尔柯克的米勒与心脏队签订三年合同
zh.summary: 中场球员卡尔文·米勒已同意与心脏队签订三年合同，将于本月晚些时候从法尔柯克加入。这笔转会加强了心脏队在即将到来的赛季前的阵容配置。

title: Toone learned 'massive lesson' from hip injury setback
summary: England footballer Ella Toone stated she learned a "massive lesson" from her recent hip injury and is now ready to return to competition. Her recovery reflects her determination to overcome setbacks and contribute to her team.
content: Ella Toone says she learned a "massive lesson" from her recent injury setback and now she is ready to perform again for England.

zh.title: 图恩从髋关节伤病挫折中学到"宝贵的教训"
zh.summary: 英格兰足球运动员埃拉·图恩表示，她从最近的髋关节伤病中学到了"宝贵的教训"，现已准备好重返赛场。她的康复体现了她克服挫折并为球队做出贡献的决心。

title: Man City consider legal action over Real candidate's promise to sign Haaland
summary: A Real Madrid presidential candidate displayed an Erling Haaland shirt on live television, prompting Manchester City to publicly reject suggestions their striker will transfer. City is reportedly considering legal action over the candidate's claims regarding their player.
content: After a candidate in Real Madrid's presidential election unveils an Erling Haaland shirt on live TV, Manchester City dismiss the suggestion their striker will move to Spain.

zh.title: 曼城考虑就皇马候选人承诺签下哈兰德采取法律行动
zh.summary: 皇马主席候选人在电视直播中展示了厄德松·哈兰德的球衣,促使曼城公开否认其前锋转会的传言。曼城据报道正在考虑就该候选人关于其球员的言论采取法律行动。

title: Two goals in 41 games - what next for Delap at Chelsea?
summary: Striker Liam Delap has managed just two goals in 41 appearances during his first year at Chelsea while battling injuries. His limited output raises questions about his future role at the club.
content: A year after striker Liam Delap joined Chelsea, he struggled to prove himself during an underwhelming and injury-hit season.

zh.title: 41场仅进2球——德拉普在切尔西的下一步是什么？
zh.summary: 前锋利亚姆·德拉普在切尔西的第一年里，在41场出场中仅打进2球，同时还在与伤病作斗争。他有限的进球数引发了人们对他在俱乐部未来角色的质疑。

title: Podcast: What is it actually like to play at a World Cup?
summary: A podcast explores the personal experience of playing at a World Cup competition as Scotland prepare for their return to the tournament, offering insights into what players face at football's biggest stage.
content: We ask what the experience of playing at a World Cup is as Scotland are set to return.

zh.title: 播客：在世界杯上比赛究竟是什么感受？
zh.summary: 一档播客探索了在世界杯比赛中的个人体验，苏格兰为重返这一赛事做准备之际，提供了球员在足球最大舞台上面临的挑战的见解。

title: Celtic hold talks with Keane, plan discussions with O'Neill - gossip
summary: Celtic are holding talks with Keane and planning discussions with O'Neill regarding the managerial position as the club seeks leadership. The moves reflect ongoing speculation around the future of the club's management.
content: Talks continue over future of Celtic manager post as Hibernian midfielder is linked with West Ham.

zh.title: 凯尔特人与基恩进行谈判，计划与奥尼尔进行讨论 - 花边新闻
zh.summary: 凯尔特人与基恩进行谈判，并计划与奥尼尔就主教练职位进行讨论，因为该俱乐部正在寻求领导力。这些举措反映了围绕俱乐部管理层未来的持续猜测。

title: Remembering Scotland's World Cup bogeymen of finals gone by
summary: The article examines Scotland's troubled history at World Cup finals since their first attempt in 1954, highlighting recurring misfortunes and obstacles the team has faced. These historical patterns provide context as Scotland prepares for their next World Cup campaign.
content: Since their first attempt in 1954 there's always been some kind of misfortune lurking in the shadows for Scotland at World Cups, writes Tom English.

zh.title: 回顾苏格兰世界杯历史上的"克星"
zh.summary: 本文审视了苏格兰自1954年首次尝试以来在世界杯决赛中的坎坷历史，强调了该队面临的反复不幸和障碍。这些历史模式为苏格兰为下一届世界杯做准备提供了背景。

title: Chelsea legend Tambling dies aged 84
summary: Bobby Tambling, Chelsea's former record goalscorer with 202 goals for the club, has died at age 84. Tambling's legacy as a Chelsea icon marks the end of an important chapter in the club's history.
content: Chelsea's former record goalscorer Bobby Tambling - who netted 202 goals for the club - dies at the age of 84.

zh.title: 切尔西传奇球星坦布林去世，享年84岁
zh.summary: 切尔西前纪录射手博比·坦布林为该队打进202球，现已去世，享年84岁。坦布林作为切尔西传奇球星的遗产标志着俱乐部历史上一个重要篇章的结束。

title: Video vault and Leeds litter picking - inside the mind of Bielsa
summary: Marcelo Bielsa, the former Leeds United manager widely regarded as having watched more football than perhaps anyone alive, is set to lead Uruguay at the World Cup. The article explores his meticulous approach and unique philosophy to the game.
content: It is possible that nobody alive today has watched more football than Marcelo Bielsa, the former Leeds United boss who will lead Uruguay at the World Cup.

zh.title: 视频库和利兹捡垃圾——比埃尔萨的思维世界
zh.summary: 前利兹联队主管马塞洛·比埃尔萨被广泛认为看过的足球比赛比任何活着的人都多，他即将率领乌拉圭队参加世界杯。该文章探讨了他对这项运动的细致方法和独特哲学。

title: A teen with no desire to be Messi: How Lamine Yamal is forging own path
summary: Lamine Yamal, an 18-year-old key figure in Spain's World Cup squad, is pushing back against comparisons to Lionel Messi while establishing his own identity as a player. The young talent's focus is on forging his unique career path rather than living in the shadow of a legend.
content: Lamine Yamal is a key figure in Spain's World Cup squad, but why is the 18-year-old quick to dismiss Messi comparisons?

zh.title: 一个不想成为梅西的少年：拉米内·亚马尔如何开创自己的道路
zh.summary: 18岁的拉米内·亚马尔是西班牙世界杯队伍的关键人物，他正在反驳与莱昂内尔·梅西的比较，同时建立自己作为球员的身份。这位年轻天才的焦点是开创自己独特的职业道路，而不是生活在传奇人物的阴影下。

title: Celtic star 'inspiring' next football generation
summary: A Celtic star's professional success is inspiring the next generation of footballers, with family, fans, and former coaches crediting the player's achievements with motivating young talent. The article highlights the broader positive impact of professional athletes on youth football development.
content: Family, fans and a former coach said Osmand's success at Celtic could help others in the island.

zh.title: 凯尔特人明星"激励"下一代足球运动员
zh.summary: 一位凯尔特人明星的职业成功激励了下一代足球运动员，家人、球迷和前教练都将这位球员的成就与激励年轻人才联系在一起。该文章强调了职业运动员对青年足球发展的广泛积极影响。

title: Liverpool's Koumas to prove worth after Wales goal
summary: Liverpool teenager Lewis Koumas is looking to establish his credentials in international football after helping Hull City earn promotion to the Premier League. The young player aims to prove his worth in a Wales shirt at the World Cup.
content: Liverpool teenager Lewis Koumas is determined to prove his worth in a Wales shirt having helped Hull City gain promotion into the Premier League.

zh.title: 利物浦库马斯威尔士进球后证明价值
zh.summary: 利物浦少年刘易斯·库马斯在帮助赫尔城获得英超升级后，寻求在国际足球中确立自己的资历。这位年轻球员希望在世界杯上穿着威尔士球衣证明自己的价值。

title: Wales diverted as weather hits Montenegro qualifier
summary: Wales' preparations for their Women's World Cup qualifier against Montenegro have been disrupted by severe weather, forcing the team to divert to Italy. The travel complications add unexpected challenges ahead of Friday's match.
content: Wales diverted to Italy as bad weather badly disrupts preparations for Friday's Women's World Cup qualifier in Montenegro.

zh.title: 威尔士因天气影响黑山预选赛而改道
zh.summary: 威尔士女足世界杯预选赛对黑山的准备工作因恶劣天气而中断，被迫改道前往意大利。旅行并发症在周五比赛前增加了意想不到的挑战。
